vocab.meaning: kiềm chế sự giận dữ khi lái xe
vocab.example: To curtail road rage during peak hours, I focus on rhythmic breathing and avoid looking at my watch.

vocab.meaning: sự di chuyển chậm chạp đến mức khổ sở
vocab.example: When the traffic reduced to an agonizingly slow crawl, I decided to switch on an educational podcast to stay productive.
Being in a state of stasis on the highway allows me a brief moment to decompress after a long day at the office.

vocab.meaning: phớt lờ/tách biệt khỏi sự ồn ào xung quanh
vocab.example: I usually put on my noise-canceling headphones to tune out the commotion of honking horns and idling engines.

vocab.meaning: giảm bớt sự đơn điệu/chán ngắt
vocab.example: I often strike up a lighthearted conversation with my fellow passengers to alleviate the tedium of a long wait.

vocab.meaning: sự tắc nghẽn không lường trước được
vocab.example: Whenever I encounter unforeseen congestion, I use my navigation app to notify my colleagues that I'll be running late.
Since the cars were moving at such a leisurely pace, I found myself observing the intricate architecture of the surrounding buildings.
I try to turn a traffic jam into a productive endeavor by mentally rehearsing my upcoming presentation.
It is quite difficult to maintain composure when you are running late, but I find that soft ambient music helps immensely.
If the jam looks permanent, I immediately search for a navigational detour to escape the bottleneck.
